claims.summary: `last_sensory_sent_unix_s` alone misses burst cadence in high-frequency sensory lanes.
claims.rationale: Added telemetry/sensory sent and received totals to `BridgeReciprocityV1`; a regression proves telemetry sends do not update the sensory timestamp.

claims.summary: Dynamic stale windows may misclassify high-entropy reflective silence as stale or recent at the wrong time.
claims.rationale: Focused `bridge_reciprocity` tests cover default, pressure/porosity, high-entropy, stale-telemetry, stale-sensory, and expired-window states without changing cadence.

claims.summary: Safety-drop accounting should not hide safety level persistence when outbound sensory messages are dropped.
claims.rationale: Source verification shows the safety-drop branch increments `messages_dropped_safety` and continues without mutating `safety_level`.
